Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' activities that are followed by 'Accepted + In Progress' within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait' compared to the frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' occurrences relative to the total occurrences of all 'Accepted + Wait*' activities (including 'Accepted + Wait - User', 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation', etc.)

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait' in cases with impact level 'High' versus 'Medium' or 'Low'
Percentage of process instances containing 'Accepted + Wait' that have a total duration above the median variant performance
